column1: # These are not permanent tool-name bans. They catch hardcoded references that are stale for the current exposed tool surface. Remove or narrow a row when the tool surface changes and the reference becomes valid again.
removed-tool-search-skills|skills|tool_search_tool_regex|Current surface does not expose this loader. Use current exposed tool names or activation helpers instead.
removed-tool-search-prompts|prompts|tool_search_tool_regex|Current surface does not expose this loader. Use current exposed tool names or activation helpers instead.
removed-tool-search-agents|agents|tool_search_tool_regex|Current surface does not expose this loader. Use current exposed tool names or activation helpers instead.
removed-tool-search-references|references|tool_search_tool_regex|Current surface does not expose this loader. Use current exposed tool names or activation helpers instead.
removed-tool-search-jobs|self-evolution/jobs|tool_search_tool_regex|Current surface does not expose this loader. Use current exposed tool names or activation helpers instead.
old-atlassian-loader-skills|skills|mcp_atlassian|Current surface does not use the retired tool_search loader regex. Use the current Atlassian MCP surface instead.
old-atlassian-loader-prompts|prompts|mcp_atlassian|Current surface does not use the retired tool_search loader regex. Use the current Atlassian MCP surface instead.
